docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $215.00 FILED BY COUGHLAN, TRACY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-POLICE DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-POLICE DEPARTMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COUGHLAN, TRACY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-POLICE DEPARTMENT $130.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $145.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-POLICE DEPARTMENT
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22814, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COUGHLAN, TRACY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-POLICE DEPARTMENT LACK OF APPEARANCE BY PLFT JUDGMT IS REVERSED.PLFT RECOVER NOTHING HEREIN & DEFT HAVE ITS COSTS OF CT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
